events.title: Flat Tire!
events.description: One of the bikes has a flat. You can try to fix it or push through.

choices.text: Warren spots a shortcut while you fix

events.title: Broken Chain
events.description: A chain snapped. Not ideal.

choices.text: MJ holds it together with brute force
Justin sprints ahead to find a bike shop

events.title: Deer Chase!
events.description: A deer started chasing you down the road. Run!

events.title: Shortcut!
events.description: Justin spots a path through the park that cuts a chunk off the trip.

choices.text: Take it (risky, might be a dead end)
Warren scouts it first to confirm

events.title: Rainstorm
events.description: Dark clouds roll in and it starts pouring.

choices.text: Justin sets a blistering pace through it

events.title: Officer on Patrol
events.description: A police officer waves you down. No riding on the sidewalk.

choices.text: Apologize and take the long detour
Carson sneaks the group through an alley
Warren distracts the officer with a story

events.title: Construction Zone
events.description: The road ahead is torn up. Detour required.

choices.text: MJ clears a path through the debris
Justin finds a gap and blazes through

events.title: Parent Call
events.description: Someone's mom is calling. If they don't answer, they're grounded.

choices.text: Carson sneaks the phone away and buys time
Warren creates a distraction so they can't hear it

events.title: Squirrel Attack!
events.description: A squirrel ran off with someone's snack bag.

events.title: Lucky Find!
events.description: You spot a crumpled bill on the side of the road.

events.title: Crash!
events.description: Someone hit a pothole and went down hard.

choices.text: MJ picks up the bike one-handed, no delay
Justin spots the pothole before anyone hits it

events.title: Snack Break
events.description: Everyone's getting tired. A snack would help.

choices.text: Justin pushes the pace so you need less energy

events.title: Dog Chase!
events.description: A big dog is chasing the group down the sidewalk.

events.title: Wrong Turn
events.description: You ended up on the wrong street. Oops.

choices.text: Warren slingshots a path marker as a landmark
Justin knew the whole time — shortcuts back instantly

events.title: Part Down!
events.description: A piece fell off one of the bikes. That's not good.

choices.text: Take it slow and limp to the next stop
MJ holds it together with brute strength
Warren scouts ahead for a hardware store

events.title: Heat Wave
events.description: It's scorching hot. Everyone's draining fast.

choices.text: Carson finds a shady back-road route
Justin sets a fast pace to blast through quick

events.title: Road Closed!
events.description: Your planned route is blocked by a road closure sign.

choices.text: Ignore the sign and ride through
Carson sneaks everyone through a gap in the barrier

events.title: Bent Rim!
events.description: Someone clipped a curb hard. The wheel is warped — every pedal stroke wobbles and squeals.

choices.text: Tap it back into shape with a rock
MJ strong-arms it back with brute force
Warren uses a curb as a lever — actually works

events.title: Big Hill Ahead
events.description: A steep hill with no way around it. Everyone can see it from a block away and nobody is happy.

choices.text: Walk the bikes up (slower but safer)
Justin sets a killer pace and drags the group up
Carson knows a winding back path, less steep

events.title: Debris on Road!
events.description: The road ahead is covered in broken glass and metal screws from a nearby construction site.

choices.text: Gun it and hope for the best
Carson guides everyone single-file through the gaps
Warren tries to slingshot the screws clear... mixed results

events.title: Red Light
events.description: A busy four-way intersection. The light just turned red and traffic is moving fast.

choices.text: Carson times the traffic gap perfectly
Justin blasts through before anyone can stop him

events.title: Yard Shortcut
events.description: A yard cuts a big chunk off the trip — but there's a fence, a BEWARE OF DOG sign, and barking.

choices.text: Risk it — cut through the yard
Carson scouts it silently, finds the safe path
Warren distracts the dog with a slingshot trick shot

events.title: Nosy Neighbor!
events.description: Mr. Henderson from two blocks over is waving you down. He looks like he's already dialing.

choices.text: Ride past him fast — don't look back
Carson vanishes behind a hedge before he sees them
Warren talks him up — kid's charm wins every time

events.title: Water Fountain!
events.description: A working water fountain by the park. Everyone is drenched in sweat. Quick stop?

choices.text: Justin refills water bottles in record time

events.title: Downhill!
events.description: A long, glorious downhill stretch. You can coast and recover — or hammer it and make up ground.

choices.text: Coast easy and let everyone rest
Justin leads a controlled fast descent
Carson reads the best racing line down

events.title: Lawn Sprinklers!
events.description: A front yard's sprinklers suddenly blast on, soaking everyone and the bikes. Chain starts slipping.

choices.text: MJ rips the sprinkler head out of the ground
Carson times the spray pattern and ducks through

events.title: Loose Handlebars!
events.description: Someone's handlebars are wobbling. One pothole away from losing steering completely.

choices.text: Stop and tighten with a coin
Warren has a multi-tool — fixed in 2 minutes
MJ holds them straight through brute grip
